/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/GetTagInfo_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/GetTagInfo_test.dir/GetTagInfo_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GetTagInfo_test.dir/Test/GetTagInfo_test.cpp.o -o GetTagInfo_test  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ymy/Developer/iiHtmlBlock/build:/home/ymy/.local/iiXml/lib:/home/ymy/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib libiiHtmlBlock.so /home/ymy/.local/iiXml/lib/libiiXml.so /home/ymy/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3
